title: BEM-827 route patch
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:29 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem826_execute_bem825_repair.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='dispatch_results_already_exist':
    status='next_parse_dispatch_results'; next_action='parse dispatch result status files and continue smoke'
elif ps=='processor_runs_no_results':
    status='patched_result_writer_needed'
    next_action='rewrite shell processor to create summary result before and after loop'
    proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
    if proc.exists():
        txt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore')
        if 'queue_processor_summary.status.json' not in txt:
            insert='printf \'{"status":"processor_entered","time":"%s"}\\n\' "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/queue_processor_summary.status.json\n'
            txt=txt.replace('count=0\n', 'count=0\n'+insert, 1)
            txt=txt.replace('echo "processed_queue_items=$count"', 'printf \'{"status":"processor_completed","processed_queue_items":%s,"time":"%s"}\\n\' "$count" "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/queue_processor_summary.status.json\necho "processed_queue_items=$count"')
            proc.write_text(txt)
elif ps=='processor_step_present_but_marker_missing':
    status='runner_step_execution_repair_needed'
    next_action='move queue processor step earlier in codex-runner job and verify lint'
elif ps=='processor_step_missing':
    status='processor_install_needed'
    next_action='install queue processor step in codex-runner'
elif ps=='runtime_state_repair_needed':
    status='runtime_state_repair_needed'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher runtime state writer'
elif ps=='real_response_repair_needed':
    status='real_response_repair_needed'
    next_action='patch Claude response prompt/provider'
else:
    status='unknown_repair_state'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-826 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-827','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem827_route_and_patch_after_bem826.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem827_route_and_patch_after_bem826.md').write_text('# BEM-827 | Route And Patch After BEM-826 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem827_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-827'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem827_route_and_patch_after_bem826.json','governance/reports/bem827_route_and_patch_after_bem826.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem827_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if ps=='processor_runs_no_results': changed.append('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-826 and patched queue processor summary result writer when marker exists but dispatch result files are missing')
"""
No issue comments.
